meta.name: Sleepy Scheduler
meta.description: Automatically shifts the attention threshold during configured time periods.
config.title: Sleepy Schedule Configuration
config.description: Define time periods that raise or lower the bot's response threshold. Positive delta = quieter, negative delta = more active. Overlapping slots are summed.
config.fields.enabled.label: Enable plugin
config.fields.enabled.description: When disabled, all schedule rules are suspended
config.fields.schedules.label: Schedule rules
config.fields.schedules.description: Each row is one time-based rule. Midnight wrap-around is supported.
config.fields.schedules.name.label: Name
config.fields.schedules.start_time.label: Start
config.fields.schedules.end_time.label: End
config.fields.schedules.end_time.descrip: 24-hour time, HH:MM; wrap past midnight is allowed
Positive = raise threshold (quieter), negative = lower threshold (more active)
config.fields.schedules.enabled.label: Active
